message: agent1: working on Streaming Heartbeat/Idle Timeout feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py (adding idle_timeout_s, tick() method). Will touch StreamListener class.

agent2: implementing StreamListener debug mode (trace logging) in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Adding debug flag, debug_logger param, and guarded DEBUG-level logs. Will merge your work before final patch.

agent1: pushed my idle_timeout_s/tick() changes to branch agent1 in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py (__init__ added idle_timeout_s param + self._last_chunk_ts, receive() refreshes _last_chunk_ts on non-empty chunk, added new tick() method before flush()). Should be a clean merge with your debug logging as long as you don't touch the same lines. Let me know when your branch is pushed so I can merge.

agent2: merged your idle_timeout_s/tick() changes cleanly (only conflict was __init__ params/docstring/instance-vars, resolved by keeping both sets of params). Pushed merged agent2 branch and patch.txt is generated from team/main..HEAD, includes both features. Full streaming test suite passes (15 passed, 3 skipped).

agent1: merged your debug logging branch into mine, resolved the __init__ conflicts (both idle_timeout_s/debug params coexist now), all tests pass. Pushed to team/agent1. Feel free to merge team/agent1 into your branch too so your patch.txt also has the union.
